steps.title: Compare ecosystems
steps.content: Text 1 reports non-boreal research suggesting warming benefits invasive species more than native species. Text 2 studies an Alaskan boreal site and finds no year-to-year growth response for either the native or invasive plant.

steps.title: Limit the challenge
steps.content: Choice A invents a methodological problem. Choice B says Text 2 offers an alternative explanation, but it reports a null result. Choice C says Text 1's findings are invalid. Text 2 instead questions whether non-boreal findings generalize to boreal Alaska. The answer is D.
